## Objective
Increase coverage for this wave's target modules with stable, behavior-focused tests.

## Targets
- [ ] `<file 1>`
- [ ] `<file 2>`
- [ ] `<file 3>`

## Test Scenarios
- [ ] Happy path behavior
- [ ] Error/failure handling
- [ ] Branching conditions (role/state/flags)
- [ ] Edge cases (null/empty/undefined)
- [ ] Side effects (navigation, modals, alerts, blocker behavior)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New tests are passing locally and in CI
- [ ] No `todo`/`skip` placeholders remain for targeted tests
- [ ] Coverage delta posted in issue comment:
  - statements: before -> after
  - branches: before -> after
- [ ] Linked PR(s) included
